top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Cycling Shimanami 2026's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before October.
43 miles on flat burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
Cycling Shimanami 2026's flat forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 43 miles.
When someone attacks on flat, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Base fitness for Cycling Shimanami 2026. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Cycling Shimanami 2026, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
2-minute all-out efforts on flat. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
Cycling Shimanami 2026's flat rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
At Cycling Shimanami 2026, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
The aerobic base that lets you ride flat at tempo for 43 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what Cycling Shimanami 2026's flat actually does to you.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Cycling Shimanami 2026. Train it until it feels boring.

race_overlay.heat: October in Imabari, Ehime Prefecture to Onomichi, Hiroshima Prefecture, Japan — Late October in the Seto Inland Sea region features mild autumn conditions with low precipitation risk and light winds, ideal for cycling. Begin heat acclimatization 10–14 days before Cycling Shimanami 2026 — 20–30min sauna sessions or midday rides in full kit. Pre-load sodium 48 hours out. Target 500–750ml/hr with electrolytes on race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Cycling Shimanami 2026’s 43 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Cycling Shimanami 2026 requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on flat to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, Durability, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 43 miles of flat in Imabari, Ehime Prefecture to Onomichi, Hiroshima Prefecture, Japan.
